Docs.summary: Fully versioned Key Url pointing to a key in KeyVault. Version segment of the Url is required regardless of rotationToLatestKeyVersionEnabled value.

MemberSignature.Value: public bool? RotationToLatestKeyVersionEnabled { get; set; }

Docs.summary: Set this flag to true to enable auto-updating of the Disk Encryption to the latest key version. Default is false.
